# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: backend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: postgres:14
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgres
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: database
  ports:
  - name: postgres
    port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: postgres
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-public-access
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      unauthenticated: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-from-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-from-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend
        namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-auth-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Service
    name: backend
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - name: frontend-mtls
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "frontend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-auth-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Service
    name: database
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - name: backend-mtls
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "backend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: backend
    kind: Service
    group: core
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api/v1
      method: GET
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api/v1
      method: POST
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
  - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
  - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
  - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config: |
    enableH2Upgrade: true
    enableEndpointSlices: true
    defaultInboundPolicy: deny
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-access
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: admin
        namespace: microservices
